meaning: International Olympic Committee 国际奥林匹克委员会(=CIO)
examples: Another nodder was the new committee chairman, a longtime survivor of IOC politics and president of the Italian national association.
Samaranch headed the IOC from 1980 to 2001.
Okay, so maybe the IOC picked the wrong rule again.
Voting against wrestling and angering the former Olympians who are IOC members would be risky.
So, what can the IOC teach the world about the value of a social media strategy?
